expectations.evidence: Lines 38-52 import multiple icons from lucide-react (TrendingUp, Users, DollarSign, Activity, Menu, etc.)
Uses dark: Tailwind classes throughout (e.g., dark:bg-slate-900, dark:text-slate-50) for dark mode support
Contains LineChart component from recharts (lines 6-14) displaying revenue data
Contains Table component (lines 24-30) with user list displaying names, emails, status, etc.
Cohesive color scheme using slate, indigo, emerald, and rose colors consistently throughout
No emoji characters used as UI icons; all icons are from lucide-react library
Responsive Tailwind classes used throughout (sm:, md:, lg: breakpoints for grid layouts and display)
